summary_text: Use this as a final-draft gate after quote extraction: ```md X-auto Draft Validation (Post-Quote) [ ] 1) Mode lock - Mode is explicitly set: `draft` / `approved for scheduler` / `manual immediate publish`. - If not explicitly set, treat as `draft`. [ ] 2) URL handling - Canonical source URL is present in `Source URLs`. - This is NOT a `note.com` lead-post case unless source is note.com. - If quote/reply flow: body contains no `x.com` / `twitter.com` URL. [ ] 3) Length - If schedulable candidate: body target is `800-1000字`. - If shorter, it is explicitly labeled as non-posting ideation. [ ] 4) Proper-noun leakage - Scan `Body`, `Body JA`, thumbnail prompt, and visible overlay text. - No person/company/product/brand/slogan leakage unless explicitly user-approved. [ ] 5) Evidence mapping - Every substantive claim maps to at least one extracted quote ID. - Keep branded/proper-noun evidence in `Source URLs` or notes when body must stay abstract. - Remove or rewrite any claim with no quote mapping. ``` Minimal pass rule: all 5 sections must pass before moving beyond draft.
